definition: maximum sound power level determined in accordance with the requirements including the uncertainties due to production, variation and measurement procedures and where the manufacturer, or his authorized representative, confirms that according to the technical instruments applied and referred to in the technical documentation is not exceeded.

definition_ml.en: maximum sound power level determined in accordance with the requirements including the uncertainties due to production, variation and measurement procedures and where the manufacturer, or his authorized representative, confirms that according to the technical instruments applied and referred to in the technical documentation is not exceeded.

note: The value shall be reported to the nearest whole number

note_ml.en: The value shall be reported to the nearest whole number
